message:
fix: update tests for GitOps SSE + RBAC hook factory extraction (#9757)

- Add missing emitError mock to analytics in api.test.ts and
  useMissions.preflight-agents.test.tsx (PR #9751 added emitError import)
- Fix styleConverter test to expect actual CSS value blur(12px) instead
  of Tailwind class blur-sm

Fixes #9756

Signed-off-by: Andy Anderson <andy@clubanderson.com>
